data.name: Enabling the Deployment of Any-Scale Robotic Applications in Microservice Architectures through Automated Containerization

data.description: Enabling the Deployment of Any-Scale Robotic Applications in Microservice Architectures through Automated Containerization uses ROS 2 Middleware.
Enabling the Deployment of Any-Scale Robotic Applications in Microservice Architectures through Automated Containerization discusses Gazebo.
